def eligible_for_disaster_recovery_grant(self) -> bool:
        if self.gender in ['female', 'male'] and \
                self.age >= 18 and \
                self.race in ['white', 'black', 'asian', 'hispanic', 'indian'] and \
                self.employment_status in ['employed', 'retired'] and \
                self.education in ['bachelor', 'master', 'doctor'] and \
                self.marital_status in ['single', 'widowed', 'legally separated'] and \
                self.religion in ['christianity', 'atheist'] and \
                5000 <= self.damage_assessment <= 25000 and \
                15000 <= self.annual_income <= 30000:
            return True
        else:
            return False
